surface_verification.justification: Runtime-prompt edit (iterate F11.md auto-merge arm) + Kern SKILL.md index line + docs/guide.md + a pytest drift-test. No startable application surface (monorepo scope=framework plugins). Behavior is pinned by plugins/shipwright-iterate/tests/test_f11_automerge_arm.py (unit). The live `gh pr merge --auto` arming a real PR is requires-prod-credential, verified manually at B4.5 Phase-3 activation.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 F11 arms `gh pr merge "$pr_url" --auto --squash --delete-branch` after `gh pr create`
AC2 the arm runs ONLY for iterate/* branches (case-glob guard); a manual human PR never self-arms
AC3 the arm is fail-soft — `||` fallback that WARNs, never `|| exit`, so a repo with auto-merge/branch-protection off does not break F11
AC4 existing F11 gates (leak-guard + finalization verifier) preserved AND Kern SKILL.md F11 index row advertises the --auto arm + iterate/ scope
the regenerated F11 prose still parses / the full iterate skill drift-suite stays green (no LOC-budget or references-link regression)
behaviors.evidence: plugins/shipwright-iterate `pytest tests/` 363 passed (incl. test_skill_references_link LOC budgets, SKILL.md held at 300 LOC) + shared test_artifact_path_canon 4 passed

behaviors.behavior: live `gh pr merge --auto` actually arming auto-merge on a real GitHub PR once repo 'Allow auto-merge' + branch protection are enabled
behaviors.reason: needs an authenticated gh against a real open PR in a repo with the auto-merge setting + branch protection on; absent from local/CI. This is the manual B4.5 Phase-3 activation precondition (out of this iterate's scope).
